prediction.reasoning: The prediction for V (Visa Inc.) in 22 days is based on a Geometric Brownian Motion (GBM) model, a common approach for short-to-medium term stock price forecasting. Historical daily price data for the past two years (up to 2024-06-03) was used to estimate the annualized drift (expected return, mu) and volatility (standard deviation of returns, sigma). For Visa Inc. (V), the annualized drift was calculated to be approximately 15.90% and the annualized volatility was approximately 19.92%. The point estimate reflects the expected price considering the historical drift. The confidence intervals are derived from the GBM model, assuming stock prices follow a log-normal distribution, which accounts for the inherent randomness and volatility of the market over the 22-day period. It's important to note that actual market movements can deviate significantly from model predictions due to unforeseen events, market sentiment, and other factors not captured by this statistical model.
